    Anahata ASI Parent 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT API

    Packages
    Package
    Description
    uno.anahata.asi
    The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi
    Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
    Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.core
    Defines the contract for providers that inject just-in-time context into an AI request.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.event
    Event-driven architecture for the Agi orchestrator.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
    Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
    Provides specialized message parts for server-side code execution.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web
    Web-centric message extensions and grounding metadata.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
    Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
    Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
    Low-level connectivity and metadata abstraction for resources.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
    Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.status
    Provides classes for managing and broadcasting agi status events.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
    Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.schema
    Provides utilities for generating OpenAPI/Swagger compliant JSON schemas for tools.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
    Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
    Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
    Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
    uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
    Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
    uno.anahata.asi.anthropic.adapter
    Provides translation adapters for the Anthropic provider.
    uno.anahata.asi.desktop
    Provides the main entry points and bootstrapping logic for the standalone Anahata ASI applications.
    uno.anahata.asi.destkop.swing
    Provides the core Swing UI components and container orchestration for the standalone Anahata ASI desktop application.
    uno.anahata.asi.gemini
    Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
    uno.anahata.asi.gemini.adapter
    Provides adapter classes for converting between the core domain model and the native Gemini API types.
    uno.anahata.asi.gemini.schema
    Provides schema generation and sanitization utilities for the Gemini provider.
    uno.anahata.asi.gemini.tokenizer
     
    uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
    Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
    uno.anahata.asi.internal
    Provides internal utility classes for the framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.minimax
    Provides the provider implementation for the MiniMax API using their Anthropic-compatible interface.
    uno.anahata.asi.modal
    Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb
    Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation
    Provides the non-intrusive annotation system for visual feedback within the NetBeans IDE.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.mine
    Provides specialized "mining" utilities for extracting deep configuration and assets from the NetBeans IDE environment.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.module
    Provides utilities for interacting with the NetBeans module system and lifecycle.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.nodes
    Provides NetBeans Node factories and implementations for representing Anahata-related entities in the IDE's project and file explorers.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.resources.handle
    Provides NetBeans-specific resource handles that bridge the IDE's Virtual File System (VFS) with the Anahata ASI resource model.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide
    Provides toolkits for interacting with the NetBeans IDE environment.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide.context
    Provides specialized context providers for the NetBeans IDE windowing system.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
    Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.classpath
    Bridging logic between Anahata's virtual resources and the NetBeans ClassPath API.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner
    The V4 AST-Guided Structural Refinement Engine.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.polymorphic
    Will be enabled when AI providers support polymorphic json objects.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven
    Contains the models and tools for interacting with the Apache Maven ecosystem within the NetBeans IDE.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
    Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.actions
    NetBeans IDE actions for managing project context within AGI sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.alerts
    Provides real-time diagnostic and alerting capabilities for NetBeans projects within the ASI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components
    Defines the structural components and domain model for NetBeans project mapping.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
    Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
    Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.resources
    Provides the visual and interactive layer for NetBeans-specific resource handles.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.util
    Provides utility classes and helper components for the Anahata ASI - NetBeans integration.
    uno.anahata.asi.openai
    High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
    uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
    Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.adapter
    Provides specialized adapters for translating between Anahata's model-agnostic domain objects and OpenAI-compatible wire formats.
    uno.anahata.asi.persistence
    State persistence and lifecycle management interfaces.
    uno.anahata.asi.persistence.kryo
    Provides Kryo serialization utilities.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing
    Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
    Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat
    Core chat interface components for the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.config
    Provides the configuration and metabolic management components for the Anahata Swing UI.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
    Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.gc
    Provides UI components for monitoring and managing the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.input
    Provides the high-fidelity user input components for the Anahata Swing UI.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
    Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part
    Provides base classes and factories for rendering individual parts of an ASI message.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text
    Provides specialized renderers for different segments of a text message part.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
    Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
    Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.render
    Provides specialized Swing renderers and utility classes for media and HTML content.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
    Provides UI components for managing and interacting with multimodal resources.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.handle
    Provides metadata panels for visualizing resource connectivity attributes.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view
    Provides specialized UI components for viewing and editing managed resources.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.status
    Provides UI components for monitoring the real-time health and usage of an AGI session.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.support
    Provides UI components for user support and community engagement.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.tool
    Provides the core framework for Swing-aware agentic tool execution.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.audio
    Provides the reactive Swing UI components for multimodal audio interaction.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.components
    Provides a collection of specialized, high-performance Swing components tailored for the Anahata ASI user interface.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.games
    The official registry for Anahata ASI easter eggs and mini-games.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons
    The central hub for all programmatically drawn icons within the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
    Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.provider
    Swing-based providers and models for managing AI model registries.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit
    Swing-specific toolkit implementations and context abstractions for Anahata ASI.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit.radio
    Provides specialized Swing UI components for the internet radio toolkit.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit.render
    Specialized rendering subsystem for Anahata Toolkits in a Swing environment.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit
    High-level tool implementations for autonomous agentic workflows.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.audio
    Audio hardware management and processing utilities.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java
    Provides the core machinery for dynamic Java compilation and execution.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.classpath
    Provides metadata-aware classpath inspection and token-optimized formatting.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
    Provides the URI-centric engine for the management and surgical mutation of multimodal resources.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text
    Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) and logic for surgical file mutations.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines
    Provides the next-generation surgical precision engine for line-based text mutations.
    uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.shell
    Host-level shell execution and stream management.
    uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools
    Provides experimental and multimodal toolkits that extend the core ASI capabilities into browser automation, advanced audio management, and speech synthesis.
    uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.browser
    Provides an abstract foundation and state management for browser automation toolkits.
    uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.chrome
    Provides a specialized toolkit for controlling Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
    uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.firefox
    Provides the specialized toolkit for web automation using the Firefox browser.
